title: Crypto: Third straight week of inflows amid geopolitical stress
description: Digital asset investment products attracted $1.06B in net inflows last week, marking the third consecutive week of positive flows, according to CoinShares’ Research department. The timing is significant: the inflows unfolded against a backdrop of mounting geopolitical pressure tied to the Iran crisis, reinforcing Bitcoin’s emerging role as a relative safe haven among institutional allocators.
